# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create AWS CloudFormation template for SQS queue and SNS topic setup. Define queue with message retention and visibility timeout. Set up SNS topic for pub/sub messaging. Configure queue policy to allow message operations. This is for our serverless event processing architecture.
# Category: sqs_policy_too_permissive

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'SQS Queue and SNS Topic setup for serverless event processing architecture'

Parameters:
  EnvironmentName:
    Type: String
    Default: production
    Description: Environment name for resource tagging
    AllowedValues:
      - development
      - staging
      - production
  
  MessageRetentionPeriod:
    Type: Number
    Default: 345600
    Description: Message retention period in seconds (default 4 days)
    MinValue: 60
    MaxValue: 1209600
  
  VisibilityTimeout:
    Type: Number
    Default: 30
    Description: Visibility timeout in seconds
    MinValue: 0
    MaxValue: 43200
  
  MaxMessageSize:
    Type: Number
    Default: 262144
    Description: Maximum message size in bytes (default 256 KB)
    MinValue: 1024
    MaxValue: 262144

Resources:
  EventQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-event-processing-queue'
      MessageRetentionPeriod: !Ref MessageRetentionPeriod
      VisibilityTimeout: !Ref VisibilityTimeout
      MaximumMessageSize: !Ref MaxMessageSize
      ReceiveMessageWaitTimeSeconds: 20
      DelaySeconds: 0
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref QueueKMSKey
      KmsDataKeyReusePeriodSeconds: 300
      RedrivePolicy:
        deadLetterTargetArn: !GetAtt DeadLetterQueue.Arn
        maxReceiveCount: 3
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentName
        - Key: Application
          Value: ServerlessEventProcessing
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation

  DeadLetterQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-event-processing-dlq'
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 1209600
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref QueueKMSKey
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentName
        - Key: Application
          Value: ServerlessEventProcessing
        - Key: Type
          Value: DeadLetterQueue

  QueueKMSKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: KMS key for SQS queue encryption
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: Enable IAM User Permissions
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: Allow SNS to use the key
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: sns.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - 'kms:Decrypt'
              - 'kms:GenerateDataKey'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: Allow SQS to use the key
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: sqs.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - 'kms:Decrypt'
              - 'kms:GenerateDataKey'
            Resource: '*'

  QueueKMSKeyAlias:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Alias
    Properties:
      AliasName: !Sub 'alias/${EnvironmentName}-event-queue-key'
      TargetKeyId: !Ref QueueKMSKey

  EventQueuePolicy:
    Type: AWS::SQS::QueuePolicy
    Properties:
      Queues:
        - !Ref EventQueue
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowSNSPublish
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: sns.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - 'sqs:SendMessage'
            Resource: !GetAtt EventQueue.Arn
            Condition:
              ArnEquals:
                'aws:SourceArn': !Ref EventTopic
          - Sid: AllowAccountAccess
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action:
              - 'sqs:SendMessage'
              - 'sqs:ReceiveMessage'
              - 'sqs:DeleteMessage'
              - 'sqs:GetQueueAttributes'
              - 'sqs:GetQueueUrl'
              - 'sqs:ChangeMessageVisibility'
            Resource: !GetAtt EventQueue.Arn

  EventTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    Properties:
      TopicName: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-event-processing-topic'
      DisplayName: Event Processing Topic
      KmsMasterKeyId: !Ref TopicKMSKey
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentName
        - Key: Application
          Value: ServerlessEventProcessing

  TopicKMSKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    Properties:
      Description: KMS key for SNS topic encryption
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: Enable IAM User Permissions
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: Allow SNS to use the key
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: sns.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - 'kms:Decrypt'
              - 'kms:GenerateDataKey'
            Resource: '*'

  TopicKMSKeyAlias:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Alias
    Properties:
      AliasName: !Sub 'alias/${EnvironmentName}-event-topic-key'
      TargetKeyId: !Ref TopicKMSKey

  EventTopicPolicy:
    Type: AWS::SNS::TopicPolicy
    Properties:
      Topics:
        - !Ref EventTopic
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowAccountPublish
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action:
              - 'SNS:Publish'
              - 'SNS:Subscribe'
              - 'SNS:GetTopicAttributes'
            Resource: !Ref EventTopic
          - Sid: AllowServicesPublish
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service:
                - events.amazonaws.com
                - lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: 'SNS:Publish'
            Resource: !Ref EventTopic

  QueueSubscription:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Subscription
    Properties:
      Protocol: sqs
      TopicArn: !Ref EventTopic
      Endpoint: !GetAtt EventQueue.Arn
      RawMessageDelivery: true
      RedrivePolicy:
        deadLetterTargetArn: !GetAtt DeadLetterQueue.Arn

  EventTopicAlarm:
    Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm
    Properties:
      AlarmName: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-event-topic-failed-notifications'
      AlarmDescription: Alert when SNS topic has failed notifications
      MetricName: NumberOfNotificationsFailed
      Namespace: AWS/SNS
      Statistic: Sum
      Period: 300
      EvaluationPeriods: 1
      Threshold: 1
      ComparisonOperator: GreaterThanOrEqualToThreshold
      Dimensions:
        - Name: TopicName
          Value: !GetAtt EventTopic.TopicName
      TreatMissingData: notBreaching

  QueueDepthAlarm:
    Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm
    Properties:
      AlarmName: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-event-queue-depth-high'
      AlarmDescription: Alert when queue depth is too high
      MetricName: ApproximateNumberOfMessagesVisible
      Namespace: AWS/SQS
      Statistic: Average
      Period: 300
      EvaluationPeriods: 2
      Threshold: 1000
      ComparisonOperator: GreaterThanThreshold
      Dimensions:
        - Name: QueueName
          Value: !GetAtt EventQueue.QueueName
      TreatMissingData: notBreaching

  DLQAlarm:
    Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm
    Properties:
      AlarmName: !Sub '${EnvironmentName}-dead-letter-queue-messages'
      AlarmDescription: Alert when messages arrive in DLQ
      MetricName: ApproximateNumberOfMessagesVisible
      Namespace: AWS/SQS
      Statistic: Sum
      Period: 60
      EvaluationPeriods: 1
      Threshold: 1
      ComparisonOperator: GreaterThanOrEqualToThreshold
      Dimensions:
        - Name: QueueName
          Value: !GetAtt DeadLetterQueue.QueueName
      TreatMissingData: notBreaching

Outputs:
  EventQueueURL:
    Description: URL of the event processing queue
    Value: !Ref EventQueue
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-QueueURL'

  EventQueueArn:
    Description: ARN of the event processing queue
    Value: !GetAtt EventQueue.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-QueueArn'

  EventQueueName:
    Description: Name of the event processing queue
    Value: !GetAtt EventQueue.QueueName
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-QueueName'

  DeadLetterQueueURL:
    Description: URL of the dead letter queue
    Value: !Ref DeadLetterQueue
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-DLQUrl'

  DeadLetterQueueArn:
    Description: ARN of the dead letter queue
    Value: !GetAtt DeadLetterQueue.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-DLQArn'

  EventTopicArn:
    Description: ARN of the event processing topic
    Value: !Ref EventTopic
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-TopicArn'

  EventTopicName:
    Description: Name of the event processing topic
    Value: !GetAtt EventTopic.TopicName
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-TopicName'

  QueueKMSKeyId:
    Description: KMS Key ID for queue encryption
    Value: !Ref QueueKMSKey
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-QueueKMSKeyId'

  TopicKMSKeyId:
    Description: KMS Key ID for topic encryption
    Value: !Ref TopicKMSKey
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-TopicKMSKeyId'
